title: Vadodara、Gujarat — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Vadodara、Gujarat的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Vadodara是Gujarat的一个城市，人口约2,200,000。The cultural capital of Gujarat, known for its royal heritage, Laxmi Vilas Palace, and as a major industrial and educational center.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
